# TESS Program G08033

Title: Flare Activity Cycles And Morphology Across Stellar Age And Effective Temperature

PI: Duvvuri, Girish - Vanderbilt University

Type: SMALL

Summary: We propose to measure the flare rates for a sample of stars spanning a range of stellar age and effective temperatures. With multiple TESS sectors of Cycle 8 data combined with past sectors, we can at last measure solar-like activity cycles in the flare rate for a significant sample of stars. Obtaining 20-second cadence lightcurves for a subset of this sample will also let us identify categories of flare morphologies. Determining the stellar parameter dependence of activity cycles and flare morphology will address open questions in flare physics and exoplanet habitability.
